title: Verify classification privacy boundaries
preconditions: Private payload canaries are placed in descriptions, tokens, rules, corpus rows, financial values, requests, and failures on every workflow.
steps: Run success, failure, interruption, abandon, cleanup, and startup recovery; inspect arguments, tracked files, permissions, stdout errors, stderr, logs, telemetry, crash output, and temporary storage.
expected: NFR-CLASSIFY-LOCAL-DATA-PROTECTION reaches zero disclosures, owner-only permissions, no raw corpus copies, and no orphan temporary artifacts.
